mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_sms_code(biz_type, phone, code_hash, expire_at, used_at, verify_fail_count, send_status, request_ip, latest_flag, create_time) VALUES(#{bizType}, #{phone}, #{codeHash}, #{expireAt}, #{usedAt}, #{verifyFailCount}, #{sendStatus}, #{requestIp}, #{latestFlag}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, biz_type, phone, code_hash, expire_at, used_at, verify_fail_count, send_status, request_ip, latest_flag, create_time FROM auth_sms_code WHERE phone = #{phone} AND biz_type = #{bizType} AND latest_flag = 1 AND used_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_sms_code SET used_at = #{usedAt}, latest_flag = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
